name: X-Golf Novi
address: 44325 W 12 Mile Rd Ste H-179, Novi, MI 48377
about: X-Golf Novi offers indoor golf simulation experiences with state-of-the-art technology, featuring a full bar and food options for an all-in-one entertainment and social environment. The venue is equipped with golf simulators that combine camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide players with a realistic golfing experience. Pricing is structured per hour per simulator bay, with rates varying by day and time of day. It caters to a wide range of customers, from beginners to seasoned golfers, and is suitable for both casual play, leagues, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems and infrared lasers
Flexible booking options for individuals, groups, and competitive leagues
PGA-certified coaching available using the simulator technology for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available
Full bar with beer on tap and by the glass, cocktails, and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary system with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary rental sets are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue offers a full bar and a menu of shareable bites and snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. With more players, you may need to book additional time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Novi welcomes children of all ages.
